fields.admin_requirements: Operators can enable the feature, configure monitored issue and PR signals, review queued monitor items, and install default issue/PR policy skills.
fields.public_requirements: No public interface; this is local operator automation.
fields.service_requirements: The scheduled monitor task must do nothing until monitor task rows exist. When configured, it polls GitHub issues and PRs, honors explicit approval reactions, maintains one active terminal, times out inactive consoles, and emails admins on failures.
fields.summary: Monitors configured GitHub readiness issues and pre-approved pull requests, then launches one local operator terminal at a time.
